global.a: Local authorities in this cluster have a high dependency ratio, high percentage of residents who are not religious, high personal wellbeing and high greenhouse gas emissions. These areas have low digital connectivity and a low percentage of employment in services.
global.b: Local authorities in this cluster have a high percentage of children in relative poverty and high level of gigabit capable broadband availability. These areas have a below average employment rate, a low number of active businesses and a lower rate of housing completions.
global.c: Local authorities in this cluster have the fastest growing population, a high employment rate and a high rate of housing completions. These areas are low for guest nights stayed, percentage of children in relative poverty and have a low proportion of private renters.
global.d: Local authorities in this cluster have a high percentage of employment in services, a high proportion of households that are renting privately and generally high results in the core economic indicators in the model including, high-growth businesses, active businesses, gross value added and gross median weekly pay. These areas are more ethnically diverse, have a low proportion of residents who are not religious and a low dependency ratio.

economic.a: Local authorities in this cluster have a high percentage of children in relative poverty, low number of active businesses, low gross median weekly pay, low employment rate, low gross value added per hour worked and a low rate of housing completions.
economic.b: Local authorities in this cluster have a high proportion of housing completions and a high percentage of employment in construction. These areas have a low percentage of employment in services, a low proportion of private renters and a low proportion of high growth businesses.
economic.c: Local authorities in this cluster have a high employment rate, high gross value added and above average gross median weekly pay. These areas have a low percentage of children in relative poverty and lower than average proportion of private renters.
economic.d: Local authorities in this cluster have a high number of active businesses, a high percentage of employment in services, more high growth businesses and high gross median weekly pay. These areas have a low proportion of private renters and a low percentage of employment in construction.

demographic.a: Local authorities in this cluster are more ethnically diverse, have a low dependency ratio, a low percentage of residents who are not religious and an above average total population.
demographic.b: Local authorities in this cluster have a high total population, above average population growth and are more ethnically diverse than average.
demographic.c: Local authorities in this cluster have high population growth, an above average dependency ratio and a low total population.
demographic.d: Local authorities in this cluster have a high percentage of white residents, a high proportion of residents who are not religious, low population growth and a low total population.
